Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

The NSF Futures Engine completed its second year and achieved significant accomplishments including: -188 distinct organizations joined as partners, coming from the Southwest US and beyond, bringing capabilities in research, regional economic development, venture capital, workforce development, l...
